title: Chris Sawyer's Locomotion
short_description: A spiritual successor to Transport Tycoon — build transport networks across land, sea, and air.
description: Chris Sawyer's Locomotion is a transport management simulation and the spiritual successor to Transport Tycoon. Players build and manage transport networks using trains, trams, buses, trucks, aircraft, and ships across a variety of scenarios. It was the last game Chris Sawyer developed solo, again written in x86 assembly language.
